'''Grumman Mogotah''' was a [[Kentra]] [[Lord/Legends|lord]] of the city [[Ironwall]] on [[Orellon II]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was very ambitious and was suspected to be planning to overthrow [[King/Legends|King]] [[Jerius]]. However, he was not evil as such, but just very ambitious and opportunistic. He was a [[Master of the Plow]].<ref name="TP" />

During a meeting with a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], he accused them of lying to the Kentra. After the Rebels had defeated the [[Voontragi]] and returned from visiting the [[Temple of the Je'ulajists]], Mogotah confronted them with a group of his supporters. Before any hostilities could break out, they were all attacked by a group of [[Glider (lizard)|gliders]]. Fighting off the gliders, the Rebels and Kentra returned to the capital city.<ref name="TP" />
